LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO AUG-12-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JESSA POST'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT GRANTS A RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AGAINST FARAGON IN THE AMOUNT OF $140,979.44 AND DENIES WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE SAME RELIEF AGAINST MUNK (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING). COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-06-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JESSA POST's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Before the court are two applications for a right to attach order and order for issuance of writ of attachment, brought by Jessa Post against Faragon Restoration Ltd. and Christian Munk respectively. For the reasons stated herein, the court grants a right to attach order and order for issuance of writ of attachment against Faragon in the amount of $140,979.44 and denies without prejudice the same relief against Munk (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Aug-12-2025 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Continued To Aug-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Continued To Aug-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Continued To Jul-31-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JESSA POST's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The court continues the hearing on Post's right to attach order to July 21, 2025. Faragon and Munk may file a surreply of no more than 10 pages of briefing, plus any evidentiary support, by July 8, 2025. Post may file a surreply of no more than 5 page of briefing, plus any evidentiary support, by July 14, 2025. The court makes no final determinations in this order and its statements in this order are merely preliminary assessments of the merits that may inform the parties' further submissions (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Continued To Jul-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JESSA POST's APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The court continues the hearing on Post's right to attach order to July 21, 2025. Faragon and Munk may file a surreply of no more than 10 pages of briefing, plus any evidentiary support, by July 8, 2025. Post may file a surreply of no more than 5 page of briefing, plus any evidentiary support, by July 14, 2025. The court makes no final determinations in this order and its statements in this order are merely preliminary assessments of the merits that may inform the parties' further submissions. (See companion order)
